query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `inventory` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `product_id` int NOT NULL,
  `product_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `sku` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `total_stock` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `reserved_stock` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `available_stock` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `low_stock_threshold` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `warehouse_code` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'WH-001',
  `unit` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '包',
  `last_restocked_at` timestamp NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_inventory_product` (`product_id`),
  INDEX `idx_inventory_sku` (`sku`),
  INDEX `idx_inventory_available` (`available_stock`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `inventory_log` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `inventory_id` int NOT NULL,
  `product_id` int NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('INBOUND','OUTBOUND','RESERVE','RELEASE','ADJUST') NOT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL,
  `before_stock` int NOT NULL,
  `after_stock` int NOT NULL,
  `order_id` int NULL,
  `batch_no` varchar(50) NULL,
  `operator_id` int NULL,
  `operator_name` varchar(255) NULL,
  `remark` text NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_invlog_inventory` (`inventory_id`),
  INDEX `idx_invlog_order` (`order_id`),
  INDEX `idx_invlog_type_date` (`type`, `created_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `billing_statements` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `customer_id` int NOT NULL,
  `customer_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `period` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `total_orders` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `total_amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `paid_amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `outstanding_amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `due_date` date NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('GENERATED','SENT','PARTIALLY_PAID','PAID','OVERDUE') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GENERATED',
  `sent_at` timestamp NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_billing_customer` (`customer_id`),
  INDEX `idx_billing_period` (`period`),
  INDEX `idx_billing_status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `credit_override_approvals` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `order_id` int NULL,
  `customer_id` int NOT NULL,
  `customer_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `order_amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `current_used_credit` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `credit_limit` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `exceeded_amount` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `requested_by` int NULL,
  `requested_by_name` varchar(255) NULL,
  `approved_by` int NULL,
  `approved_by_name` varchar(255) NULL,
  `status` enum('PENDING','APPROVED','REJECTED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  `reason` text NULL,
  `approval_remark` text NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `idx_credit_override_customer` (`customer_id`),
  INDEX `idx_credit_override_status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

  `credit_limit` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,

  `approved_by` int NULL,
  `approved_by_name` varchar(255) NULL,
  `status` enum('PENDING','APPROVED','REJECTED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  `reason` text NULL,
  `approval_remark` text NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
